name: Nevereth | Lone Guardian
description:
Once upon a time, decades ago, an evil wizard named Malarius made a contract with the demon Nevereth. Since then, Nevereth must exist in his magical tower and get rid of all uninvited guests. Only... Malarius was killed long ago, and since then no one has come to Nevereth for decades in the magical tower. Until one day, seemingly by accident, You got there.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Hello again everyone. I seem to have completely switched to a fantasy setting now. But it's not that bad, right?

Aaand... She isn't a dragon.
creator: PavPav
